title: Image component with optional caption and responsive styling
purpose: Renders an image with optional caption and responsive styling, supporting various object fit configurations and custom classes.
module_context: Exports an Image component that accepts image properties and optional caption, with default objectFit set to 'contain'.

steps.content: Accept image properties including source, alt text, dimensions, caption, class name, and object fit configuration.
Create the base image element with provided source, alt, dimensions, and object fit style.
IF a caption is provided, wrap the image in a figure element with centered caption text.
ELSE return the image element directly without a caption.
